content.json:
# Agent sessions backup — system health
Live fleet, queue, parsing, ingestion, and availability signals. Health snapshots refresh every 15 minutes; operational charts use the windows shown in each title. `No data` is intentionally visible as a degraded state, not treated as healthy.

content.title: At-a-glance status
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
let latest_watchdog = toscalar(logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event == 'hub.watchdog.run'
    | summarize max(TimeGenerated));
let latest_roster_ok = toscalar(logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event == 'hub.watchdog.run'
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, body)
    | project tobool(body.roster_ok));
let max_heartbeat_age = toscalar(logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event == 'hub.machine.health'
    | summarize max(tolong(body.heartbeat_age_seconds)));
let latest_fleet = logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(2h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event == 'hub.fleet.health'
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, body);
let latest_fleet_time = toscalar(latest_fleet | project TimeGenerated);
let pending = toscalar(latest_fleet | project tolong(body.files_pending));
let file_errors = toscalar(latest_fleet | project tolong(body.files_error));
let session_errors = toscalar(latest_fleet | project tolong(body.sessions_error));
let recent_parse_errors = toscalar(logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event in ('parse.error', 'parse.export.error')
    | summarize count());
union
    (print Metric='Watchdog', Value=iff(isnull(latest_watchdog), 'No data', strcat(datetime_diff('minute', now(), latest_watchdog), ' min ago')), Status=case(isnull(latest_watchdog), 'CRITICAL', latest_watchdog < ago(35m), 'CRITICAL', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='D1 roster', Value=case(isnull(latest_roster_ok), 'No data', latest_roster_ok, 'Readable', 'Unavailable'), Status=case(isnull(latest_roster_ok), 'CRITICAL', latest_roster_ok, 'Healthy', 'CRITICAL')),
    (print Metric='Fleet snapshot', Value=iff(isnull(latest_fleet_time), 'No data', strcat(datetime_diff('minute', now(), latest_fleet_time), ' min ago')), Status=case(isnull(latest_fleet_time), 'CRITICAL', latest_fleet_time < ago(35m), 'CRITICAL', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='Oldest heartbeat', Value=iff(isnull(max_heartbeat_age), 'No data', strcat(round(toreal(max_heartbeat_age) / 60.0, 1), ' min')), Status=case(isnull(max_heartbeat_age), 'CRITICAL', max_heartbeat_age > 259200, 'CRITICAL', max_heartbeat_age > 3600, 'Warning', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='Parse queue backlog', Value=iff(isnull(pending), 'No data', tostring(pending)), Status=case(isnull(pending), 'CRITICAL', pending > 0, 'Warning', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='File errors', Value=iff(isnull(file_errors), 'No data', tostring(file_errors)), Status=case(isnull(file_errors), 'CRITICAL', file_errors > 0, 'CRITICAL', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='Session errors', Value=iff(isnull(session_errors), 'No data', tostring(session_errors)), Status=case(isnull(session_errors), 'CRITICAL', session_errors > 0, 'CRITICAL', 'Healthy')),
    (print Metric='Parse errors (1h)', Value=tostring(recent_parse_errors), Status=iff(recent_parse_errors > 0, 'CRITICAL', 'Healthy'))
| project Metric, Value, Status

content.title: Latest fleet snapshot
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
logs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend body = todynamic(Body)
| where body.event == 'hub.fleet.health'
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, body)
| extend Status=case(isnull(TimeGenerated), 'CRITICAL - No data', TimeGenerated < ago(35m), 'CRITICAL - Stale snapshot', 'Current')
| project Status, Snapshot=TimeGenerated,
          Machines=tolong(body.machine_count),
          FilesTotal=tolong(body.files_total),
          FilesPending=tolong(body.files_pending),
          FilesComplete=tolong(body.files_complete),
          FilesParsed=tolong(body.files_parsed),
          FilesSkipped=tolong(body.files_skipped),
          FilesSuperseded=tolong(body.files_superseded),
          FileErrors=tolong(body.files_error),
          SessionsTotal=tolong(body.sessions_total),
          SessionsReady=tolong(body.sessions_ready),
          SessionsParsing=tolong(body.sessions_parsing),
          SessionErrors=tolong(body.sessions_error)

content.title: Per-machine health (latest snapshot)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
let machine_health = logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
    | extend body = todynamic(Body)
    | where body.event == 'hub.machine.health'
    | extend machine = tostring(body.machine)
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, body) by machine
    | extend HeartbeatAgeSeconds=tolong(body.heartbeat_age_seconds), UploadAgeSeconds=tolong(body.upload_age_seconds)
    | extend Health=case(TimeGenerated < ago(35m), 'CRITICAL - Stale snapshot', HeartbeatAgeSeconds > 259200 or tolong(body.files_error) > 0, 'CRITICAL', HeartbeatAgeSeconds > 3600 or tolong(body.files_pending) > 0, 'Warning', 'Healthy')
    | project Machine=machine, Health, OS=tostring(body.os), Collector=tostring(body.collector_version), Snapshot=TimeGenerated, LastSeen=todatetime(body.last_seen_at), LastUpload=todatetime(body.last_upload_at), HeartbeatAgeMinutes=round(toreal(HeartbeatAgeSeconds) / 60.0, 1), UploadAgeMinutes=round(toreal(UploadAgeSeconds) / 60.0, 1), FilesPending=tolong(body.files_pending), FileErrors=tolong(body.files_error), FilesComplete=tolong(body.files_complete), FilesTotal=tolong(body.files_total)
    | extend IsSentinel=false;
let machine_count = toscalar(machine_health | summarize count());
union machine_health, (print Machine='', Health='CRITICAL - No data', OS='', Collector='', Snapshot=todatetime(''), LastSeen=todatetime(''), LastUpload=todatetime(''), HeartbeatAgeMinutes=toreal(''), UploadAgeMinutes=toreal(''), FilesPending=tolong(''), FileErrors=tolong(''), FilesComplete=tolong(''), FilesTotal=tolong(''), IsSentinel=true)
| where machine_count == 0 or not(IsSentinel)
| extend HealthRank=case(Health startswith 'CRITICAL', 0, Health == 'Warning', 1, 2)
| order by HealthRank asc, FilesPending desc, HeartbeatAgeMinutes desc
| project-away HealthRank, IsSentinel

content.title: File parse queue and session backlog (24h, 15-minute snapshots)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
logs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend body = todynamic(Body)
| where body.event == 'hub.fleet.health'
| project TimeGenerated, FilesPending=tolong(body.files_pending), FileErrors=tolong(body.files_error), SessionsParsing=tolong(body.sessions_parsing), SessionErrors=tolong(body.sessions_error)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Parse throughput and errors (24h, 15-minute bins)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
logs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend body = todynamic(Body), Event=tostring(todynamic(Body).event)
| where Event in ('parse.done', 'parse.error', 'parse.export', 'parse.export.error')
| summarize Completed=countif(Event in ('parse.done', 'parse.export')), Errors=countif(Event in ('parse.error', 'parse.export.error')), ParseErrorLines=sumif(tolong(body.parse_error_lines), Event == 'parse.done') by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| project TimeGenerated, Completed, Errors, ParseErrorLines
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Upload and multipart activity (24h, 15-minute bins)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
logs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend Event=tostring(todynamic(Body).event)
| where Event in ('access.upload', 'access.multipart_create')
| summarize Uploads=countif(Event == 'access.upload'), MultipartCreates=countif(Event == 'access.multipart_create') by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| project TimeGenerated, Uploads, MultipartCreates
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Azure ingestion freshness and delay (1h)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, IngestedAt:datetime)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, IngestedAt=ingestion_time());
let spans = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, IngestedAt:datetime)[]),
    (OTelSpans | project TimeGenerated, IngestedAt=ingestion_time());
union (logs | extend Signal='Logs'), (spans | extend Signal='Traces')
| where IngestedAt > ago(1h)
| extend DelaySeconds=datetime_diff('millisecond', IngestedAt, TimeGenerated) / 1000.0
| summarize Records=count(), LatestGenerated=max(TimeGenerated), LatestIngested=max(IngestedAt), FreshnessSeconds=datetime_diff('second', now(), max(IngestedAt)), P50DelaySeconds=round(percentile(DelaySeconds, 50), 1), P95DelaySeconds=round(percentile(DelaySeconds, 95), 1), MaxDelaySeconds=round(max(DelaySeconds), 1), Over5Minutes=countif(DelaySeconds > 300), Over10Minutes=countif(DelaySeconds > 600) by Signal

content.title: Logs and traces volume (24h, 15-minute bins)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated);
let spans = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime)[]),
    (OTelSpans | project TimeGenerated);
union (logs | extend Signal='Logs'), (spans | extend Signal='Traces')
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Records=count() by Signal, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| project TimeGenerated, Signal, Records
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: Health endpoint availability (24h)
content.query:
let availability = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Name:string, Location:string, Success:bool, DurationMs:real, Message:string)[]),
    (AppAvailabilityResults | project TimeGenerated, Name, Location, Success=tobool(Success), DurationMs=toreal(DurationMs), Message);
availability
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Checks=count(), Succeeded=countif(Success), Failed=countif(not(Success)), AvailabilityPercent=round(100.0 * countif(Success) / count(), 2), P95DurationMs=round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 1), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by Name, Location
| order by Failed desc, Location asc

content.title: D1 database size (14d)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body);
logs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| extend body = todynamic(Body)
| where body.event == 'hub.d1.db_size_bytes'
| extend SizeGiB=round(toreal(body.bytes) / 1073741824.0, 3)
| project TimeGenerated, SizeGiB
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.title: HTTP request health by operation (1h)
content.query:
let spans = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Kind:string, Name:string, EnrichedName:string, Data:string, Success:bool, DurationMs:real, ResultCode:string, ItemCount:long)[]),
    (OTelSpans | project TimeGenerated, Kind, Name, EnrichedName, Data, Success=tobool(Success), DurationMs=toreal(DurationMs), ResultCode, ItemCount=tolong(ItemCount));
spans
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) and Kind == 'Server'
| extend Method=iff(isempty(Name), 'UNKNOWN', toupper(Name)), Path=tostring(parse_url(Data).Path), Weight=coalesce(ItemCount, 1)
| extend Family=case(
    Path == '/api/v1/files/check', '/api/v1/files/check',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/' and Method == 'PUT' and Data contains 'uploadId=', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path [multipart part]',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/' and Method == 'PUT', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path [upload]',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/' and Method == 'POST' and Data contains 'uploads', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path [multipart create]',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/' and Method == 'POST' and Data contains 'uploadId=', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path [multipart complete]',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/' and Method == 'DELETE', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path [multipart abort]',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/files/', '/api/v1/files/:machine/:store/:path',
    Path matches regex '^/api/v1/sessions/[^/]+/raw$', '/api/v1/sessions/:id/raw',
    Path matches regex '^/api/v1/sessions/[^/]+$', '/api/v1/sessions/:id',
    Path == '/api/v1/sessions', '/api/v1/sessions',
    Path == '/api/v1/search', '/api/v1/search',
    Path == '/api/v1/status', '/api/v1/status',
    Path == '/api/v1/usage', '/api/v1/usage',
    Path == '/api/v1/heartbeat', '/api/v1/heartbeat',
    Path == '/api/v1/bootstrap', '/api/v1/bootstrap',
    Path == '/api/v1/machines', '/api/v1/machines',
    Path == '/api/v1/certs/renew', '/api/v1/certs/renew',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/admin/cloudflare-oauth/', '/api/v1/admin/cloudflare-oauth/:action',
    Path == '/api/v1/admin/machines', '/api/v1/admin/machines',
    Path == '/api/v1/admin/reindex', '/api/v1/admin/reindex',
    Path == '/healthz', '/healthz',
    Path == '/', '/',
    Path startswith '/api/v1/', '/api/v1/:other',
    '/:other')
| extend Operation=strcat(Method, ' ', Family)
| summarize Requests=sum(Weight), Failures=sumif(Weight, not(Success)), P50DurationMs=round(percentile(DurationMs, 50), 1), P95DurationMs=round(percentile(DurationMs, 95), 1), MaxDurationMs=round(max(DurationMs), 1), Latest=max(TimeGenerated) by Operation
| top 25 by Requests desc

content.title: Recent structured errors and warnings (24h)
content.query:
let logs = union isfuzzy=true
    (datatable(TimeGenerated:datetime, Body:string, SeverityText:string, TraceId:string, SpanId:string)[]),
    (OTelLogs | project TimeGenerated, Body, SeverityText, TraceId, SpanId);
let errors = logs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
    | summarize Occurrences=count(), SeverityText=any(SeverityText) by TimeGenerated, Body, TraceId, SpanId
    | extend body=todynamic(Body), Event=tostring(todynamic(Body).event)
    | extend Payload=todynamic(body.payload)
    | extend Level=coalesce(tostring(Payload.level), tostring(body.level), SeverityText), Code=coalesce(tostring(Payload.code), tostring(body.code)), Message=coalesce(tostring(Payload.message), tostring(body.error), tostring(body.message))
    | where Level in~ ('error', 'fatal', 'warn', 'warning') or Event contains '.error' or Event contains '_error' or Event contains '.warn' or Event contains '_warn' or Event contains 'failed'
    | project TimeGenerated, Occurrences, Severity=Level, Event, Machine=tostring(body.machine), Code, Tag=tostring(body.tag), Error=Message, TraceId, SpanId, Details=Body
    | extend IsSentinel=false;
let error_count = toscalar(errors | summarize count());
union errors, (print TimeGenerated=now(), Occurrences=tolong(0), Severity='Healthy', Event='No structured warnings or errors in the past 24h', Machine='', Code='', Tag='', Error='', TraceId='', SpanId='', Details='', IsSentinel=true)
| where error_count == 0 or not(IsSentinel)
| top 100 by TimeGenerated desc
| project-away IsSentinel
